zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick於1480年出生在英國素可素維其可時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Southwick25歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Barnham20歲。他於1515年與Dorothy Chapman在英國哈普爾素維其可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年10月28日在英國哈普爾素維其可享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可聖 邁克爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick于1480年出生在英国素可素維其可时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Southwick25岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Barnham20岁。他于1515年与Dorothy Chapman在英国哈普爾素維其可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1550年10月28日在英国哈普爾素維其可享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可聖 邁克爾。

nameMeanings.name: Barnham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of the places named Barnham, in Suffolk and Sussex, or from Barnham Broom in Norfolk. Each of these place-names is from the Old English male personal name Beorn or Beorna, + hām ‘large farming estate’.

variants.name: Barnum
meanings: Altered form of English Barnham: habitational name from any of the places called Barnham in Suffolk and West Sussex, or Barnham Broom in Norfolk, all of which were named with the male personal name Beorn or Beorna + Old English hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Southwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Southwick, including those in Durham, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, and Wiltshire, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick was born in 1480, in Southwick, Sussex, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Southwick, was 25 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Barnham, was 20. He married Dorothy Chapman in 1515, in Southwick, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 28 October 1550, in Southwick, Hampshire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in St Michael, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick est né en 1480, à Southwick, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Southwick, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Barnham, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Chapman en 1515, à Southwick, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1550, à Southwick, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à St Michael, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1515 in Southwick, Hampshire, England Dorothy Chapman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Oktober 1550 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Southwick, Hampshire, England und wurde in St Michael, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick è nato il nel 1480 nel Southwick, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Southwick, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Barnham, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Chapman nel 1515, nel Southwick, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 28 ottobre 1550, nel Southwick, Hampshire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a St Michael, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwickが1480年にイギリススセックスソウスウィックで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Southwickは25歳，母Lady Elizabeth Barnhamは20歳であった。1515年にイギリスハンプシュアイアソウスウィックでDorothy Chapmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年10月28日にイギリスハンプシュアイアソウスウィックで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックススト ミチャエルにて埋葬された。

ko.London, Canterbury, Kent, England, Unite: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이 디오스스 프 런던
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick(이)가 1480년 영국 수세스 소우스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Southwick(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Barnham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1515년 영국 함프실르 소우스윅에서 Dorothy Chapman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 10월 28일 영국 함프실르 소우스윅에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 스트 믹하얼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick nasceu em 1480, em Southwick, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Southwick, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Barnham, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Chapman em 1515, em Southwick, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1550, em Southwick, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em St Michael, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.London, Canterbury, Kent, England, Unite: диосес оф лондон, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick родился в 1480 г. в местности соутвикк, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Southwick было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Barnham, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Chapman в 1515 г. в местности соутвикк, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 28 октября 1550 г. в местности соутвикк, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мачаел, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Dorothy Chapman en 1515, en Southwick, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1550, en Southwick, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en St Michael, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
